_note: Sample incident records. Full schema is Sprint 3. STAFF-ONLY fields marked. No real PII.
_security_note: parents.visibility.incidents=false hides incident records from restricted households (see families.json family-001 co-guardian). Never expose staff_notes to parent-role sessions.

records.summary: Verbal disagreement over seat assignment. Resolved with peer mediation.
records.staff_notes_STAFF_ONLY: Third similar incident this month. Monitoring for pattern. Counselor informed.
records.action_taken: Peer mediation session completed. Student self-reflection form submitted.

records.summary: Student reported headache during morning session. Parent contacted. Student rested and recovered.
records.staff_notes_STAFF_ONLY: Parent (Sandra) picked up and returned same day. No further action needed.
records.action_taken: Student rested in office. Parent notified at 10:15 AM.
